summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
The things I would tell my clients this week
Risk buildup continues. Another bank failed in the US. The Fed is preparing to deliver another rate hike - and perhaps more.

children.title: A bank, the Fed, a ceiling and the (short-term absence) of fear
section_path: A bank, the Fed, a ceiling and the (short-term absence) of fear
children.section_path_text: A bank, the Fed, a ceiling and the (short-term absence) of fear
children.summary:
"Be fearful when others are greedy, and greedy when others are fearful"
-Warren Buffet, letter to Shareholders 2004
Another week, another regional bank failure. First Republic, a 37-year-old bank from San Francisco became the third US regional bank and fourth in a row to fail (including Credit Suisse).
